concerns.reviewer_concern: Why Graph-CDM is not just generic reweighting.
concerns.author_response: Graph-CDM first computes a label-space structured inconsistency diagnostic across prediction, neighborhood, view, and chain terms, then maps that diagnostic into evidence-preserving weights. The weighting is downstream of graph label consistency rather than a generic confidence threshold.
concerns.manuscript_location_already_addressing_i: Method: Graph-CDM label-space diagnostic; Evidence-preserving training weights.
concerns.if_revision_requested_proposed_manuscrip: If requested, add a short ablation pointer to the existing hard-deletion and component tables.

concerns.reviewer_concern: Why label-space diagnostic is used instead of embedding distance.
concerns.author_response: The noisy-label decision is made in label space, so label-space disagreement keeps the diagnostic aligned with the supervised corruption process and avoids interpreting representation geometry as evidence of label error.
concerns.if_revision_requested_proposed_manuscrip: Add a sentence contrasting label-space CDM with embedding-distance filters.

concerns.reviewer_concern: Why FINE-style is excluded from formal results.
concerns.author_response: FINE-style was implemented as a representation/eigenvector filtering baseline but failed the pre-registered real-data smoke gate on CICIDS-2017 symmetric noise, so the artifact excludes it instead of reporting an unstable value.
concerns.manuscript_location_already_addressing_i: D11 Limitations and D9.5 smoke report.

concerns.author_response: Decoupling updates on prediction disagreement; structured SOC noise can make related alerts agree on the same wrong label, reducing the value of disagreement-only filtering.
The implementation is a lightweight tabular approximation and is explicitly not presented as full Co-Teaching, avoiding fidelity overclaiming.
concerns.if_revision_requested_proposed_manuscrip: Keep lite wording in all tables and captions.

concerns.author_response: The project did not have a verified source and license path, so it is excluded rather than used as an unverified dataset.
Verified provenance events needed for the enterprise case were unavailable; reporting OpTC as a formal experiment would overstate evidence.
CESNET postfilter25 is declared as a deterministic audit-window subset and is interpreted as cross-domain stability and retention evidence, not full-archive coverage.
ERR is not classification accuracy; it measures retention of clean informative samples under a retained-mask threshold. A value of 1.0 means all samples in that subset remained retained.

concerns.reviewer_concern: Why compression ratio is an operational proxy.
concerns.author_response: Compression approximates review-load reduction and is paired with ERR so the paper does not claim analyst-time savings without an analyst study.
concerns.if_revision_requested_proposed_manuscrip: If requested, add examples of queue-review interpretation.

concerns.reviewer_concern: Why Graph-CoLD still matters when CESNET Macro-F1 is near ceiling.
concerns.author_response: CESNET has strongly separable TLS/flow features in the postfilter25 subset, so Macro-F1 margin is not the primary signal; evidence retention and cross-domain stability remain informative.

concerns.reviewer_concern: Why excluded baselines are not reported.
concerns.author_response: The artifact reports only implemented and real-data smoke-passed baselines to avoid fake, unstable, or unverified comparisons.

concerns.reviewer_concern: Why statistical tests are paired and scenario-level.
concerns.author_response: Methods are compared under the same dataset, noise type, noise rate, graph beta, and seed, so paired scenario-level tests match the repeated evaluation design better than pooled tests.
concerns.if_revision_requested_proposed_manuscrip: Add a caveat that scenario settings are not independent operational deployments.

concerns.reviewer_concern: Why active view masks avoid artificial process/TI views.
concerns.author_response: Views are enabled only when fields exist in the verified dataset contract; missing process or threat-intelligence fields are disabled rather than invented.
concerns.manuscript_location_already_addressing_i: Multi-view graph construction and dataset view policy report.

concerns.author_response: Future work covers faithful broader baselines, verified enterprise provenance data, analyst-in-the-loop validation, and sensitivity studies for evidence-score choices.
concerns.if_revision_requested_proposed_manuscrip: Expand if reviewers request a roadmap.
